## Workflows

| Workflow                                                                     | Triggers                                        | pnpm commands                                                                              |
| ---------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| [Bootstrap milestones](../../.github/workflows/bootstrap-milestones.yml)     | push, workflow_dispatch                         |                                                                                            |
| [CI](../../.github/workflows/ci.yml)                                         | push, pull_request                              | build, check:edge-functions:bundling:full, docs:check-links, docs:gen:check, format:check… |
| [Deno create-payment](../../.github/workflows/deno-create-payment.yml)       | push, pull_request                              |                                                                                            |
| [E2E](../../.github/workflows/e2e.yml)                                       | push, pull_request, schedule, workflow_dispatch | e2e:ci:shard, e2e:ci:smoke                                                                 |
| [Monitor payment events](../../.github/workflows/monitor-payment-events.yml) | schedule, workflow_dispatch                     |                                                                                            |
| [Project catalog](../../.github/workflows/project-catalog.yml)               | push, pull_request, schedule, workflow_dispatch | project:catalog, project:catalog:check                                                     |
| [PostgREST RPC smoke](../../.github/workflows/rpc-postgrest-smoke.yml)       | workflow_dispatch                               | test:rpc-smoke                                                                             |

## Platform areas

- **Storefront** (`storefront`, layer: spa)
- **Checkout & payments** (`checkout-payments`, layer: spa)
- **Edge functions** (`edge`, layer: edge)
- **Admin** (`admin`, layer: spa)
- **Infra & CI** (`infra-ci`, layer: ci)
- **Docs & security** (`docs-security`, layer: docs)

Open [reports/project-dashboard.html](../../reports/project-dashboard.html) locally after `pnpm run project:catalog` (also uploaded as a CI artifact).
